title: DIMCP EP_31 YAK y'all ready kno

transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Transmissions going on.
[00:00:05.00] What's up? Transmissions a little iffy.
[00:00:10.00] How is the problem with this car?
[00:00:12.00] It's kind of stutter as we switch it between gears.
[00:00:15.00] Stutter is switching between gears and that's mentioned.
[00:00:18.00] The electricity is going out.
[00:00:20.00] It's holding on the window.
[00:00:22.00] I'm trying to smoke a cigarette and carry a drink at the same time.
[00:00:26.00] Hey, liver dog.
[00:00:28.00] Check it out.
[00:00:29.00] They got a dog sticker on their flicking cart.
[00:00:32.00] How about that?
[00:00:33.00] You don't see that every day.
[00:00:35.00] It's psych.
[00:00:36.00] Anyways, I'm taking this pen to express to Josh C.
[00:00:40.00] He lives way out, way, way far out here.
[00:00:45.00] I'm in a good mood.
[00:00:49.00] I don't know what it is.
[00:00:52.00] What it is.
[00:00:53.00] Rarf out!
[00:00:54.00] Yeah, I really know what I need to do.
[00:00:56.00] I really know what it is.
[00:00:58.00] Yuck, you already know.
[00:00:59.00] Rarf off!
